states.name: wrapping-up
states.description: Memo being finalized; refusing structural changes.

transitions.guard: User wants to revise findings or add data; not just polish.

stages.name: gathering
stages.description: Wide candidate scan. Cast a wide net.

stages.name: shortlisting
stages.description: Narrow candidates to ~5-8 by direct fit.

stages.name: researching
stages.description: Deep research on the final three; populate findings.

stages.name: synthesizing
stages.description: Build the comparison; identify the differentiation thesis.

cross_store_invariants.description: Every finding must reference an existing competitor.
Every finding must reference an existing dimension.
Every finding's source_refs must reference existing sources.
A competitor in 'final-three' state must have a profile document.
